reasoning: The AU-10(3) control focuses on non-repudiation and maintaining a chain of custody for reviewer or releaser credentials. In Kubernetes, this can be addressed by ensuring audit logging is enabled to capture access and changes to resources, which supports non-repudiation by providing a traceable log of actions. Additionally, configuring audit log retention ensures that logs are preserved for a sufficient period to support investigations. RBAC controls can be configured to ensure that only authorized users have access to audit logs, maintaining the integrity of the chain of custody.
